comment.label: job-filters.ts
comment.text: Split this module: move the URL-param parsing concern (parseJobFilters, its SearchParamObject/SearchParamSource types, and its private sort/apply validators) into a new lib/filter-params.ts. Keep the job predicates and sorting (hasPublicListingSignal, applyBucketsForJob, jobMatchesFilters, sortJobsForDirectory) in lib/job-filters.ts. Preserve the public parseJobFilters import path for existing callers by re-exporting it from lib/job-filters.ts.
